chat_log.content:
I've loaded your profile. You're Alfredo — this is our first session together, and I don't have any information about you yet.

Before we do anything else, I want to spend about 20 minutes getting an accurate picture of who you are and what you're up against — not the elevator pitch version, the honest one. I'll ask about your background, what you're building, and what typically gets in your way. From that I'll calibrate how I coach you. There are no right answers. The less polished your answers are, the more useful this will be. Goals come after this — first I want to understand the person.

Let's start with your background.

What did you do before this? Not the LinkedIn version — what did the work actually involve, and how long did you do it?
Graphic and web design for small businesses and some agencies
How long were you doing that work? And what made you leave, or start building something alongside it — was this a deliberate decision, or did something push you?
